pi_items.source: FITS header TELESCOP='UIT' and ORIGIN='UIT/GSFC', downloaded from fits.gsfc.nasa.gov
task.json instructions and expected output path in setup_task.sh

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real astronomical data from the NASA Ultraviolet Imaging Telescope (UIT). The target FITS file UITfuv2582gc.fits (containing NGC 4151) is downloaded from NASA GSFC and renamed to uit_galaxy_sample.fits. Ground truth analysis using Python and astropy confirms the galaxy center is at X=266, Y=279, with a computed half-light radius of 84 pixels.
